label: PaidBy
description: Open banking account-to-account payment provider offering instant, cardless direct bank payments as a checkout alternative, settling over UK Faster Payments and SEPA Instant. Operated by Xryma Plc Group (ISX Financial UK Ltd), an FCA-authorised EMI (FRN 901034) and Central Bank of Cyprus authorised EEA EMI.
note: PISP / A2A payments. FCA UK authorised EMI FRN 901034; Central Bank of Cyprus authorised EEA EMI. Wix partnership for UK merchant checkout.
